title: China Secretly Preparing New Weapons Shipment To Iran: Report
summary_full: Beijing is preparing to transfer shoulder-fired anti-air missile systems known as MANPADs, report said.
summary_public: Beijing is preparing to transfer shoulder-fired anti-air missile systems known as MANPADs, report said.
